shapes.frame_eqs_str: a['r']=-Math.sin(div(a['time'],4)); a['g']=-Math.sin(div(a['time'],3)); a['b']=-Math.sin(div(a['time'],5)); a['r2']=-Math.sin(div(a['time'],2.5)); a['g2']=-Math.sin(div(a['time'],7)); a['b2']=-Math.sin(a['time']);

a['x']=div((Math.sin(a['time'])+1),2); a['y']=div((Math.cos(a['time'])+1),2); a['r']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],4)); a['g']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],3)); a['b']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],5)); a['r2']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],2.5)); a['g2']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],7)); a['b2']=Math.sin(a['time']); a['rad']=(0.12+(0.28*div((a['bass_att']+a['treb_att']),2)));

frame_eqs_str: a['wave_r']=Math.sin((a['time']*2)); a['wave_b']=Math.sin((a['time']*4)); a['wave_g']=Math.sin((a['time']*3)); a['wave_a']=0; a['ob_r']=(1-a['wave_r']); a['ob_b']=(1-a['wave_b']); a['ob_g']=(1-a['wave_g']);
